ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "ip_instance" TEXT /* Name of the IP instance from which the event originated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the event (Input or Output) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Info, Warning, Error, Critical) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_ip_instance FOREIGN KEY ("ip_instance") REFERENCES ip_instances ("instance_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the IP instance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the instance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instance (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of the IP instance (e.g., Core, Backup, Edge) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check or monitoring */,
  "uptime" TEXT /* Uptime of the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, operator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Additional permissions or roles the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered or accessed the event log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event log (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., Debug, Info, Warning, Error) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or context about the log entry */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the log was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the event type (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
